name: SimpleCurveFitter
javadoc:
/**
 * Fits points to a user-defined {@link ParametricUnivariateFunction function}.
 *
 * @since 3.4
 */

members.name: create
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Creates a curve fitter.
 * The maximum number of iterations of the optimization algorithm is set
 * to {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE}.
 *
 * @param f Function to fit.
 * @param start Initial guess for the parameters.  Cannot be {@code null}.
 * Its length must be consistent with the number of parameters of the
 * function to fit.
 * @return a curve fitter.
 *
 * @see #withStartPoint(double[])
 * @see #withMaxIterations(int)
 */

tags.name: f
tags.description: f must be of type ParametricUnivariateFunction

tags.name: start
tags.content: Initial guess for the parameters.  Cannot be {@code null}. Its length must be consistent with the number of parameters of the function to fit.

members.code:
/**
 * Creates a curve fitter.
 * The maximum number of iterations of the optimization algorithm is set
 * to {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE}.
 *
 * @param f Function to fit.
 * @param start Initial guess for the parameters.  Cannot be {@code null}.
 * Its length must be consistent with the number of parameters of the
 * function to fit.
 * @return a curve fitter.
 *
 * @see #withStartPoint(double[])
 * @see #withMaxIterations(int)
 */
public static SimpleCurveFitter create(ParametricUnivariateFunction f, double[] start) {
    return new SimpleCurveFitter(f, start, Integer.MAX_VALUE);
}

members.name: withStartPoint
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Configure the start point (initial guess).
 * @param newStart new start point (initial guess)
 * @return a new instance.
 */

tags.name: newStart
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.newStart instanceof java.lang.Double && args[0] instanceof java.lang.Double;
tags.description: the start point (initial guess) must be a double

members.name: withMaxIterations
members.javadoc:
/**
